uk: Св. мученика Андрія Стратопедарха – сотника, і тих, що з ним.
saints.en: St. Martyr Andrew Stratelates and those with him

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизми нема. На «Господи, взиваю» – 6 стихир: 3 свята і 3 мч., Слава: мч., І нині: свята. На стиховні: стихири свята. По «Отче наш»: тропар мч., Слава, І нині: свята. Відпуст середній з помин. служби свята і мч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свята (2), Слава: мч., І нині: свята. Катизми чергові і сідальний свята. Псалом 50. Канон свята і мч. По 9-ій – світильний мч. Слава, І нині: світильний свята. Стиховня – вся свята. По «Отче наш»: тропар мч., Слава, І нині: свята.
Часи: тропар свята, також на 3-му і 9-му ще Слава: мч., кондаки – поперемінно, тобто: на 1-му і 6-му – свята, на 3-му і 9-му – мч.
Літургія: антифони повсякденні. Тропар і кондак свята. Прокімен, алилуя, причасний – свята. Ап. – 2 Кор. 189 зач.; 9, 12 – 10, 7. Єв. – Мр. 13 зач.; 3, 20-27. Замість «Достойно» – приспів і ірмос 9-ї пісні канону свята.

troparion_en.text: You renounced the glory of earthly rank / and inherited the kingdom of heaven; / you adorned your incorruptible crown as with beautiful stones. / You led an army of martyrs to Christ, / and with the angels in the never-fading light / you found Christ the never-setting sun. / Together with those who suffered with you, / holy general Andrew, / ever pray to Him that He may save our souls.

kontakion_en.text: Standing before the Lord in prayer like a star near the sun, / you were filled with ineffable joy beholding your desire: the treasure of the kingdom. / You sing without ceasing to the immortal King / together with the angels throughout the ages. / With them, general Andrew, unceasingly pray for us all.

matched_oca_saint: Martyr Andrew Stratelates, and 2,593 soldiers with him, in Cilicia

oca_saints.name: Afterfeast of the Dormition of the Mother of God

troparion.text: In giving birth you preserved your virginity, / in falling asleep you did not forsake the world, O Theotokos. / You were translated to life, O Mother of Life, / and by your prayers, you deliver our souls from death.

kontakion.text: Neither the tomb, nor death could hold the Theotokos, / who is constant in prayer and our firm hope in her intercessions. / For being the Mother of Life, / she was translated to life by the One who dwelt in her virginal womb.

oca_saints.name: Martyr Andrew Stratelates, and 2,593 soldiers with him, in Cilicia

troparion.text: You renounced the glory of earthly rank / and inherited the kingdom of heaven; / you adorned your incorruptible crown as with beautiful stones. / You led an army of martyrs to Christ, / and with the angels in the never-fading light / you found Christ the never-setting sun. / Together with those who suffered with you, / holy general Andrew, / ever pray to Him that He may save our souls.

kontakion.text: Standing before the Lord in prayer like a star near the sun, / you were filled with ineffable joy beholding your desire: the treasure of the kingdom. / You sing without ceasing to the immortal King / together with the angels throughout the ages. / With them, general Andrew, unceasingly pray for us all.

troparion.text: Instructor of Orthodoxy, teacher of piety, and treasury of mercy,  / adornment of bishops, mentor of the people of Zyryansk,  / O Hierarch Pitirim, you lay down your life for Christ,  / pray to the only Lover of mankind for your flock, and for all who lovingly honor your memory.

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Timothy, Agapius, and Thekla, of Palestine

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs Timothy, Agapius, and Thekla, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Venerable Theophanes of Docheiariou, Mount Athos

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theophanes, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Don Icon of the Mother of God

troparion.text: O All-hymned Mother, and glorified by all, /  the Queen Mother of God,  / the Mother of the Creator of all created things,  / the hope of Christians and Protectress of those who have no hope,  / and despair of expecting quick help, we beseech you:  / be merciful to us sinners, do not abandon your servants, /  and do not reject the prayers of those who are unworthy.  / We pray, beholding the revered image of your holy and wonderworking Icon we cry out:  / “May your mercy be with those who sail and travel; /  may your mercy be upon them. /  O Sovereign Lady, protect me by your precious robe,  / in all difficult situations preserve the faithful,  / and entreat Christ God, Who was born of you,  / that He may save our souls from sins.”

kontakion.text: Having moved to the Heavenly abodes with your body,  / you did not leave those living on earth, O Theotokos,  / having granted the opportunity to contemplate and venerate your sacred and wonderworking Icon to all those who love you,  / as a sign of your grace, /  we venerate it by kissing it.
